title: *: split docker.go for future pkg creation
body:
cc @mtrmac 

PTAL, this splits that ugly `docker.go` - I'll follow up with another PR to move to have a library for this whole docker push/pull but for now it's a lot better to have those files now

Signed-off-by: Antonio Murdaca runcom@redhat.com

comments.body: This is definitely a great cleanup. Just two nits.
